hero.title: Your infrastructure under reliable control
hero.sub1: Full management of your business IT infrastructure. We handle everything — from servers to security. No downtime. No chaos.
hero.sub2: We start with an audit: we review backups, servers, 1C and remote access, quantify the risks in money and provide a clear action plan — so your infrastructure never lets the business down.

processSteps.title: How to start working with us

items.title: Request & call
items.description: Leave a request — we call back within one business day to discuss the task and your infrastructure.

items.title: Audit
items.description: We audit your infrastructure: document the current state, risks, and remediation cost.

items.title: Contract & onboarding
items.description: The audit cost is credited to the first month. We sign a contract with a fixed SLA and get started.

slaGuarantee.title: We're accountable for deadlines — not just promising
slaGuarantee.sub: Response times are fixed in the contract for every plan. If we miss them, that's our liability, not your risk.

items.title: Response time — in the contract, not just talk
items.description: From 1 hour to the next business day, depending on the plan. Fixed in the SLA.

items.title: Compensation for SLA breaches
items.description: If we breach the SLA, a reducing coefficient is applied to that month's fee. A missed deadline lowers your invoice — it doesn't just earn an apology.

items.title: 1C Support
items.description: Your 1C runs fast and without failures: we manage the servers and databases, apply updates and control employee access. Accounting and warehouse never stall.

items.title: Data Loss Protection
items.description: We set up automatic backups of all critical data and regularly verify the copies actually restore. Losing a database or documents is off the table.

items.title: Servers & Computing
items.description: Company servers run stably without overspending: we plan capacity for your workload, watch the load and fix issues before they stop the business.

items.title: Breach & Leak Protection
items.description: Secure remote access for employees, control over who can access what, and continuous monitoring for suspicious activity across the company network.

items.title: Bitrix24 Support
items.description: We tune Bitrix24 to your processes: employee permissions, telephony, integrations and automation of routine operations — no in-house specialist needed.

items.title: Telephony & Communications
items.description: Customer communication without missed calls: office telephony, call recording, smart call routing and CRM integration.

audits.title: IT Audit Types
audits.sub: Each audit delivers a clear report and action plan. Audit cost is credited against the first month of managed services.

items.title: Comprehensive IT Audit
items.description: Full infrastructure review: backups, servers, 1C and remote access. We document the current state, quantify the risks in money and prioritise tasks.

items.title: Backup & Recovery Audit
items.description: We verify that backups are actually recoverable. Storage scheme, restore test, data loss risks and remediation recommendations.

items.title: 1C Infrastructure Audit
items.description: Full analysis of 1C servers, MSSQL and database placement. Performance, rights, exchanges, backup and potential failure points.

items.title: Virtualisation & Server Audit
items.description: Hypervisor state, VMs, resources and fault tolerance. Risks and recommendations on optimisation and redundancy.

items.title: Security & Access Audit
items.description: Perimeter assessment, VPN, 2FA, access policies and risks. We record vulnerabilities with prioritised remediation steps.

pricing.title: Cost Estimate Examples
pricing.sub: Reference figures based on real client configurations. The exact price is fixed in the contract after an audit.
pricing.note: These are reference points: the final amount depends on your infrastructure. Estimate your own configuration in the calculator — it takes a minute.

about.title: Our principles
about.sub: We work where others struggle: 1C, MSSQL, Exchange, VMware, Proxmox, Bitrix24. We go deep into the niche — it's our primary focus, not a side service.

items.title: Audit first
items.description: Every project starts with an audit. We review backups, servers and remote access — and quantify the risks in money.

items.title: Transparent plan
items.description: Scope and SLA are fixed in the contract. Clear pricing, no hidden rates.

items.title: Fast response
items.description: We respond within an hour on critical incidents. The problem won't wait — neither do we.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.description: We don't just fix things — we help build infrastructure that grows with your business.

items.q: When does a company need an IT infrastructure audit?
items.a: Most often when incidents start piling up, 1C slows down or backups have not been tested for years. We document the current state, quantify the risks and prioritise tasks.

items.q: How is an audit different from routine administration?
items.a: Routine administration is about keeping systems running and putting out fires. An audit is a higher-level look at architecture, backups, security and processes. The outcome is a clear report and roadmap.
After the audit we offer options: a one-off remediation project for critical risks or long-term managed services with a fixed fee and SLA.

items.q: How much does the audit cost?
items.a: A comprehensive IT infrastructure audit starts from ₽25,000. If you move to managed services, the audit cost is credited to the first month.

items.q: How long does the audit take?
items.a: Typically 3 to 5 business days, depending on infrastructure size: number of servers, VMs and areas to review. Smaller companies usually take 2 to 3 days.

items.q: Do you need physical access to the servers?
items.a: No. In most cases remote access is sufficient. We work via VPN or a secure tunnel without an on-site visit. On-site visits are available on request.
It depends on the plan: from monitoring and backup control through to full management of infrastructure, 1C, security and a fractional IT director role.

items.q: Can we hand over only part of the tasks?
items.a: Yes. We can tailor the scope flexibly: monitoring and backups only, 1C infrastructure only, or specific areas. The final scope is fixed in the contract.

items.q: What's the difference between you and an in-house sysadmin?
items.a: An in-house sysadmin is one person with limited expertise and a single point of failure (vacation, sick leave). We're a team with experience across 1C, VMware, Proxmox and Bitrix24, a fixed-response SLA, and backup coverage if any one specialist is unavailable.
